## Testing & Verification

<!--
We typically require automated tests and/or manual verification results.
- For backend changes: run `npm run test` inside the `/backend` directory. If adding new features, please add corresponding unit tests under `/backend/tests`.
- For frontend/UI changes: perform manual verification and describe the steps below.
-->

### Automated Tests
- [ ] Backend tests run and pass successfully (`npm test` in `/backend`)
- [ ] New unit tests added for new logic/endpoints (if applicable)

### Test Execution Details

## Checklist

<!--
Before submitting your PR, please verify the following checks:
-->

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors
- [ ] I have verified that both the frontend and backend run successfully locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] I am contributing under GSSoC 2026 guidelines
